user.title: Crop Steering — setup method
user.description: Choose how to configure the system. The UI wizard maps everything with dropdowns (no file). The .env file is for power users who prefer text.

data_description.name: A label for this integration in Home Assistant.
data_description.config_method: UI = pick entities with dropdowns. .env = read your crop_steering.env text file.

data_description.num_zones: How many independent irrigation zones (valves) you control. You map each one's sensors next.

data_description.zone_1_switch: The switch entity that opens zone 1's irrigation valve.
data_description.zone_1_vwc: One or more substrate moisture (VWC) probes in zone 1. Pick a representative block. Choose several and the engine averages them with outlier rejection.
data_description.zone_1_ec: One or more substrate EC (pore-water) probes in zone 1. Several are averaged.
data_description.zone_1_plant_count: Number of plants in zone 1. Scales shot volume (per-plant substrate x plants).

data_description.pump_switch: Main water pump. Leave EMPTY if your system auto-starts the pump when flow opens (constant-pressure).
data_description.main_line_switch: Main-line solenoid feeding all zones; opens before each zone valve.
data_description.waste_switch: Recirc/waste valve, forced closed during a shot so feed reaches the plants. Leave empty if you have none.
data_description.light_entity: Your grow-light entity so the system knows day vs night.
data_description.lights_on_hour: Hour (0-23) the lights turn ON. Starts the grow-day; daily water/shot counters reset here.
data_description.lights_off_hour: Hour (0-23) the lights turn OFF. Forces every zone into the overnight dry-back phase (P3).
data_description.substrate_volume: PER-PLANT block/pot volume in litres (e.g. 6 for a 6 L rockwool block). The engine multiplies by plant count.
data_description.dripper_flow_rate: Flow per dripper in litres/hour (e.g. 4 for a 4 L/hr emitter). Drives shot duration.
data_description.field_capacity: Maximum VWC% your substrate holds after draining — the saturation ceiling.
data_description.max_ec: Maximum safe pore EC (mS/cm). Above this the engine flushes with feed water rather than adding nutrients.
data_description.temperature_sensor: Room/canopy temperature sensor. Optional, for analytics only.
data_description.humidity_sensor: Room relative-humidity sensor. Optional, for analytics only.
data_description.water_level_sensor: Reservoir/tank level sensor. Optional; triggers low-water alerts.
data_description.notification_service: Where alerts go, e.g. notify.mobile_app_your_phone. (The add-on engine also has its own notify setting.)

load_env.title: Load from crop_steering.env
load_env.description: Some entities in the file weren't found. Tick to proceed anyway, or fix the file and retry.

data_description.ignore_missing: Create the integration even though {count} entity id(s) in the file don't exist yet.

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found in Home Assistant.
error.invalid_moisture_sensor: Invalid moisture sensor — must report in %.
error.missing_entities: Some entities in the file don't exist.

abort.yaml_invalid_format: config.yaml is not in the expected format.

reload_env.title: Reload .env
reload_env.description: Re-reads crop_steering.env and updates the zone/hardware mapping. Only works if this integration was set up from .env.

data_description.num_zones: Increase to add a zone, decrease to remove the highest-numbered ones.

data_description.pump_switch: Main water pump. Leave EMPTY if your system auto-starts the pump when flow opens (constant-pressure).
data_description.main_line_switch: Main-line solenoid feeding all zones; opens before each zone valve.
data_description.waste_switch: Recirc/waste valve, forced closed during a shot so feed reaches the plants. Leave empty if you have none.
data_description.light_entity: Your grow-light entity so the system knows day vs night.
data_description.lights_on_hour: Hour (0-23) the lights turn ON. Starts the grow-day; daily water/shot counters reset here.
data_description.lights_off_hour: Hour (0-23) the lights turn OFF. Forces every zone into the overnight dry-back phase (P3).
data_description.substrate_volume: PER-PLANT block/pot volume in litres (e.g. 6 for a 6 L rockwool block). The engine multiplies by plant count.
data_description.dripper_flow_rate: Flow per dripper in litres/hour (e.g. 4 for a 4 L/hr emitter). Drives shot duration.
data_description.field_capacity: Maximum VWC% your substrate holds after draining — the saturation ceiling.
data_description.max_ec: Maximum safe pore EC (mS/cm). Above this the engine flushes with feed water rather than adding nutrients.
data_description.temperature_sensor: Room/canopy temperature sensor. Optional, for analytics only.
data_description.humidity_sensor: Room relative-humidity sensor. Optional, for analytics only.
data_description.water_level_sensor: Reservoir/tank level sensor. Optional; triggers low-water alerts.
data_description.notification_service: Where alerts go, e.g. notify.mobile_app_your_phone. (The add-on engine also has its own notify setting.)

edit_parameters.title: Irrigation parameters
edit_parameters.description: Quick edits. You can also change these on the dashboard number entities.

data_description.substrate_volume: Per-plant block/pot litres; the engine multiplies by plant count.
data_description.dripper_flow_rate: Litres/hour per dripper. Drives shot duration.
data_description.p1_target_vwc: Ramp-up target moisture; once reached the zone moves to maintenance (P2).
data_description.p2_vwc_threshold: During maintenance, water when VWC drops below this. Keep it below P1 target to avoid oscillation.

data_description.ec_stacking: Progressively raise EC through P0->P3 instead of one flat target.
data_description.analytics: Track dryback rates and trends. Minimal overhead.
data_description.ml_features: Experimental ML predictions. Not deployed in the f2-control engine — leave off.
